title: Proclamation of Independence — Majagi
description: Public Notice of Proclamation of Independence by Juma Samuel Fejo of the Larrakia Majagi Tribe, asserting ancestral rights and tribal lore under the principle "first in time, best at law". Includes the Royal Bloodline Lineage of the Bilby and the Quoll (FEJO Family) and Statement of Claim against the NT Government (2024).

title: Customary Law Notice — UTCLA (January 2023)
description: Official notice issued on the 6th day of January 2023 (Ref MTT000555) by the United Tribal Countries Land Alliance, documenting the Custodial Tribal High Court proceedings, findings on lawful standing of Original Tribal Countries, and trademark registrations lodged with TIBNLA Patent and Trademark Office for Member Nations.

title: Grandmother Lore Notice (December 2023)
description: Official Lore Notice issued 4 December 2023 (Instrument No. DSDAUSJP130-20231204-1601-GM-001) by Grandmothers Lore — the superior Lore/Law on the aniuima (land) of the Continent known as Terra Australis. Includes open letter to Heads of State, letter to WIPO and IP Australia, and the Statement of Truth of Juma of the Larrakia.

title: Original Traditional Sovereign Nationals — Rights over Land, Seas & Airways (February 2026)
description: Declaration affirming the rights of Original Traditional Sovereign Nationals over the land, seas and airways of Terra Australis, issued February 2026.

title: Letter from the Russian Ambassador — Alexey Pavlovsky (August 2023)
description: Official correspondence dated 16 August 2023 from Ambassador Alexey Pavlovsky of the Embassy of the Russian Federation to Craig-Richard Oldroyd, Head of State/Ambassador of Majagi. The Ambassador expresses Russia's respect and sympathy for the Majagi Nation and all Aboriginal Nations of Terra Australis, confirms the Embassy is exploring ways to engage with the Majagi Nation, and attaches the Russian Ministry of Foreign Affairs Report on the Human Rights Situation in Australia.

title: Russian Ministry of Foreign Affairs — Human Rights Situation in Australia
description: Report by the Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the Russian Federation on the Human Rights Situation in Certain Countries — Australia section. Provided as an attachment to the August 2023 letter from Ambassador Pavlovsky. Documents systemic human rights concerns including the treatment of Aboriginal peoples, incarceration rates, land rights violations, and the ongoing failure to remedy discrimination against Indigenous communities.

title: Lawful Standing — Customary Flag Law Ceremony (1 January 2023)
description: Photographic record of the Customary Flag Law Ceremony restating customary land claim on Country, held on 1 January 2023. Juma of the Larrakia with the Majagi flag.
